response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure embedded environments as required; their C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month academic thesis and NI LabWindows™/CVI work, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols central to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Proven track record in open-source leadership and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven architectures and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Minimal recent or deep C++/STL experience in production high-performance systems
No demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, industrial cybersecurity, or MQTT/Modbus protocols
Lacks direct experience in on-premises industrial automation platforms or real-time embedded systems
